@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface "LogCollector" as LogCollector << (I,#b7a7e6) >>
LogCollector : collect()

class "FtpLogFileDownloader" as FtpLogFileDownloader << (C,#b7e1c1) >>
class "SockerLogReader" as SockerLogReader << (C,#b7e1c1) >>
class "DbTableLogGateway" as DbTableLogGateway << (C,#b7e1c1) >>

FtpLogFileDownloader ..|> LogCollector
SockerLogReader ..|> LogCollector
DbTableLogGateway ..|> LogCollector
@enduml
